content.text:
Based on the visual inspection of the molecule, atom 19 (Carbon) is covalently bonded to the following neighbor atoms:
- Atom index 18 (Element: C)
- Atom index 20 (Element: C)
- Atom index 30 (Element: H)

The geomconf_index is 534.

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 19 (element: C). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
